endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/locations/{location}/CheckDnsNameAvailability
endpoints.description: Checks whether a domain name in the cloudapp.net zone is available for use.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.
